blocks.text: Arsenal's Title Charge, Hovland Hunting Glory — Saturday Delivers
A stacked Saturday: Arsenal can extend their Premier League lead, Viktor Hovland chases THE PLAYERS glory at TPC Sawgrass, and Norwegian cyclists grind through Tirreno-Adriatico. Buckle up.
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship — Round 2 continues at TPC Sawgrass. Hovland off to a strong start (NRK: 'Sterk Hovland-start'); Kristoffer Reitan also flying the flag. Five players share the lead at -5.
